title: 10 health benefits of Cleome viscosa (spider flower)
intro: Cleome viscosa has health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and saponins, which help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. By consuming spider flower tea or applying its oil topically, individuals can experience relief from congestion and coughs, allowing them to breathe easier and enjoy improved overall health. This natural remedy can be especially beneficial for those living in areas with high air pollution.
